description.p: RustConn is a modern connection manager for Linux with a GTK4/Wayland-native interface. Manage SSH, RDP, VNC, SPICE, MOSH, Telnet, Serial, Kubernetes, and Zero Trust connections from a single application. Core protocols use embedded Rust implementations with no external dependencies required.

Organize connections into groups and tags, split terminals side by side, automate tasks with expect scripts and command snippets, and import from Remmina, Asbru-CM, MobaXterm, Royal TS, SSH config, or Ansible inventory.

ul.li: SSH, MOSH, Telnet, Serial, and Kubernetes with embedded VTE terminals
RDP via IronRDP, VNC via vnc-rs, and SPICE via spice-client with external fallback
Zero Trust tunnels: AWS SSM, GCP IAP, Azure Bastion, Cloudflare, Teleport, Tailscale, Hoop.dev
Credential storage via KeePassXC, GNOME Keyring, Bitwarden, 1Password, or Passbolt
Split view, cluster commands, session logging, and Wake-on-LAN

screenshot.caption: SFTP file browser via Midnight Commander

description.p: Bug fixes, context menu UX improvements, and SSH keep-alive support:

ul.li: Reconnect preserves tab position instead of appending to end
Context menu handoff between sidebar items fixed
Stale highlight on right-click no longer persists
Context menu switches between items with a single right-click
Context menu layout reordered to follow GNOME HIG conventions
SSH Keep-Alive settings (ServerAliveInterval, ServerAliveCountMax)

description.p: Version 0.11.0 — UX Modernization and Security Improvements:

ul.li: General tab migrated to adw:: widgets (PreferencesGroup, EntryRow, SpinRow, ComboRow)
Legacy XOR encryption migration warning with toast notification
State access helpers to reduce RefCell borrow panics
RDP connection state structured into RdpConnectionContext
Automation task validation hardened with property tests and env var sanitization
Split view tab colors preserved across Settings dialog
Group Operations mode — compact pill icon buttons with animated Revealer
Split view context menu Copy/Paste/Select All now works in split panels
Eliminated gdk_clipboard_write_async assertion on clipboard operations
Lazy Bitwarden credential decryption — only when Bitwarden is active backend

description.p: Version 0.10.22 — Terminal context menu fix:

ul.li: Fixed terminal context menu Copy/Paste not working (#84)
Fixed gdk_clipboard_write_async assertion on Copy
Fixed blank menus on X11 desktops like MATE and XFCE (#85)
Context menu labels now localized (Copy, Paste, Select All)

description.p: Security hardening, sidebar UX fixes, and accessibility improvements:

ul.li: Machine key encryption hardened — HKDF-SHA256 derivation, removed predictable fallback
Groups expand/collapse on double-click anywhere on the row
Ctrl+K no longer hijacks terminal (nano, etc.) — only Ctrl+F for search
Right-click context menu works on all SSH profiles
Filter bar opens below search box instead of above
Sidebar accessible labels localized for screen readers

description.p: Bug fixes for RDP shared folders, Tailscale CLI download, and SSH port forwarding UI:

ul.li: Tab group chooser dialog with existing group selection
Close All in Group context menu action
Group name as tab title prefix (no longer conflicts with split view colors)
Updated FreeRDP to 3.24.2 (security fixes) and VTE to 0.80.3

description.p: Terminal font zoom and copy-on-select for VTE-based sessions.

ul.li: Added terminal font zoom — Ctrl+Scroll wheel to increase/decrease, Ctrl+Plus/Minus keyboard shortcuts, and Ctrl+0 to reset; per-session zoom using VTE native font_scale (#77)
Added copy on select — optional X11-style auto-copy; selected text is automatically copied to clipboard; enable in Settings → Terminal → Behavior (#78)

description.p: Flatpak SSH terminal fix and sidebar state preservation.

ul.li: Fixed clear command not working in Flatpak SSH sessions — forces TERM=xterm-256color for all remote commands (#25)
Fixed sidebar scroll position lost after editing/moving connections — chained idle callbacks prevent race
Fixed sorting collapsed all expanded groups — expanded state now preserved across sort operations

description.p: Context menu fix: replaced PopoverMenu with direct action buttons.

ul.li: Fixed sidebar context menu actions still not working — PopoverMenu cannot resolve win.* actions inside ListView/TreeExpander; replaced with plain Popover + Button widgets (#75)

description.p: Flatpak clear command fix, keyboard shortcuts dialog corrections, and FreeRDP security update.

ul.li: Fixed clear command not working in Flatpak — ANSI escape sequence wrapper added (#25)
Fixed keyboard shortcuts dialog showing wrong bindings — 19 discrepancies corrected
Added 13 missing shortcuts to the shortcuts help dialog
FreeRDP updated to 3.24.2 (CVE fixes for client-side vulnerabilities)
User Guide keyboard shortcuts tables fully synchronized with actual keybindings
Added terminal clear troubleshooting section to User Guide

description.p: Bugfix release: fixes SSH auto-reconnect infinite loop.

ul.li: Fixed SSH auto-reconnect infinite loop on authentication failures (Permission denied)
Fixed duplicate child-exited signal handlers for SSH and Telnet sessions
FreeRDP 3.24.0 → 3.24.1 (security fix), Boundary CLI 0.21.1 → 0.21.2

description.p: Technical audit release: security hardening, performance optimizations, and dead code cleanup.

ul.li: VNC password stored as SecretString — zeroized on drop, protected from accidental logging
VNC pixel buffer max resolution guard — prevents OOM from malicious server
RDP 4K frame conversion zero-copy — eliminates 33 MB allocation per frame for BGRA
Sidebar search highlight regex cached — compiled once per query change
Log sanitization custom patterns pre-compiled at construction time
Removed ~1050 lines of unused wayland_surface.rs stub module
Removed deprecated OpenTelemetry tracing variant and RDPDR dead code stubs
Dependencies: gtk4 0.11.2, glib 0.22.4, pango 0.22.4, zip 8.5.1
CLI downloads: TigerVNC 1.16.2 (security fix), Teleport 18.7.3, Bitwarden CLI 2026.3.0

description.p: RDP Mouse Jiggler, Connect All in Folder, Host Online Check, Terminal Activity Monitor.

ul.li: RDP Mouse Jiggler — prevents idle disconnect with periodic mouse movements
Connect All in Folder — open all connections in a group at once
Copy Username / Copy Password from sidebar context menu
Host Online Check — TCP probe with auto-connect when host comes online
WoL + Auto-Connect — polls and auto-connects when host is ready
Terminal Activity Monitor — per-session activity and silence detection

description.p: Flatpak sandbox permissions cleanup, HIG improvements, and internal quality.

ul.li: Removed extra Flatpak sandbox permissions rejected by Flathub lint review
Added Flatpak Sandbox Overrides section to User Guide with manual override instructions
Bulk delete dialog migrated to AdwAlertDialog (GNOME HIG)
Background thread result delivery uses event-driven channel instead of polling
Added 14 unit tests for vault credential key generation

description.p: Hoop.dev Zero Trust provider, security hardening, custom SSH agent socket, and changelog correction.

ul.li: Hoop.dev Zero Trust provider (11th provider) with CLI detection, GUI fields, Flatpak support
Custom SSH agent socket override (global and per-connection)
Orphaned subgroups cascade-delete fix
Tar archive path traversal defense-in-depth (CVE-2026-33056)
RDP certificate default changed to trust-on-first-use
Bitwarden/1Password credentials no longer exposed in process list
Export file permissions hardened to 0600
VNC and FreeRDP custom args blocklists
Pass backend path traversal prevention
Log sanitization expanded with token detection
Corrected: v0.9.11 Flatpak uses --device=all, not --device=serial

description.p: Flatpak gcloud install fix, SPICE/VNC rendering performance (persistent Cairo surface), regex caching and deduplication.
Performance and quality release: 4K RDP rendering optimization, cursor artifact fix, 39 audit fixes.
HiDPI RDP fix, Passbolt CLI 0.4.2 compatibility, and secret backend improvements:

ul.li: Fixed Passbolt credential retrieval broken with CLI 0.4.2 — JSON fields are now lowercase (#69)
Fixed blurry/artifact RDP image on HiDPI displays — proper device scale on Cairo surface
Fixed 1Password JSON parse errors silently ignored — now logs warning
CLI downloads: 1Password CLI 2.33.0 to 2.33.1
Dependencies: ipconfig 0.3.4, libredox 0.1.15, proptest 1.11.0

description.p: KeePassXC CLI integration fix:

ul.li: Fixed database password not passed to keepassxc-cli in vault operations (#68)
Fixed silent error swallowing in KeePass credential retrieval
Added -q flag to all keepassxc-cli show commands
Dependencies: deflate64 0.1.12, toml 1.1.0, zip 8.4.0

description.p: Flatpak Zero Trust CLI fixes, libvirt daemon import, and packaging improvements.

ul.li: Fixed Zero Trust CLIs crashing in Flatpak due to read-only filesystem — config paths redirected to writable sandbox directories for gcloud, Azure CLI, Teleport, and OCI CLI
Fixed Zero Trust CLI tools not found in Flatpak — extended PATH now includes Flatpak CLI directories
Fixed failed connections stuck in yellow "connecting" state — now transitions to red on launch failure
Fixed VTE regex warning on highlight rule registration
Added libvirt daemon import — query running VMs via virsh dumpxml
Added missing FreeRDP and Waypipe modules to Flatpak manifests
Added ARM64 release builds for deb, rpm, and AppImage
Wrapped 5 untranslated UI strings and added translations for all 15 languages
Updated Tailscale 1.94.2 to 1.96.2, moka 0.12.15, yuv 0.8.12

description.p: Security hardening and reliability fixes.

ul.li: RDP password no longer visible in process listings
SSH agent passphrase temp files securely wiped before deletion
Fixed highlight rules not applied without per-connection rules
Fixed config file corruption on crash — now uses atomic writes
Sidebar shows full connection name and host on hover
Removed unused code and improved log sanitization performance

description.p: Session recording fixes, MOSH dispatch, and packaging improvements.

ul.li: Fixed MOSH connections silently failing — added missing dispatch handler
Fixed session recording: script visibility, double exit freeze, lost commands in playback
Fixed auto-recording and highlight rules not applied after connection
Fixed .rdp file association — MIME type installed in all packaging formats
Fixed picocom detection in Flatpak and improved RDP error messages
CSV import now auto-detects delimiter from file content
Script credentials test button with timeout and masked output preview

description.p: Eight new features: MOSH protocol, CSV import/export, session recording, text highlighting, ad-hoc broadcast, smart folders, script credentials, and per-connection terminal theming.

ul.li: MOSH protocol with predict mode, UDP port range, and server binary path
CSV import/export with auto column mapping and configurable delimiter
Session recording in scriptreplay-compatible format with sensitive output sanitization
Text highlighting rules with regex patterns, per-connection and global defaults
Ad-hoc broadcast to send keystrokes to multiple terminals simultaneously
Smart Folders for dynamic connection grouping by protocol, tags, or host pattern
Script credentials to resolve passwords from external commands
Per-connection terminal theming with background, foreground, and cursor colors
Fixed Flatpak SSH key paths becoming stale after rebuild
All 15 language translations updated for new features

description.p: Major platform upgrade: GTK4 0.11, libadwaita 0.9, GNOME 50 runtime, and FreeRDP bundled in Flatpak.

ul.li: RDP file association — double-click .rdp files to open and connect automatically
FreeRDP 3.24.0 bundled in Flatpak — external RDP works out of the box on Wayland
GTK-rs bindings upgraded to unlock GNOME 48–50 widget APIs
Flatpak runtime bumped to GNOME 50 with VTE 0.80
Accessibility: CSS prefers-reduced-motion support
Fixed SSH jump host, mc wrapper, and Zero Trust connections in Flatpak
Fixed RDP gateway ignored in embedded mode — auto-fallback to FreeRDP
Fixed default window size too small on first start
Translated protocol display names across all 15 languages

description.p: Hide local cursor option and SSH fixes:

ul.li: Added "Show Local Cursor" option for embedded RDP, VNC, and SPICE viewers to eliminate double cursor
Fixed VNC session ignores Display Mode setting — Fullscreen and External modes now work correctly
Fixed SSH port forwarding, X11 forwarding, compression, and ControlPersist not applied from UI settings
Fixed SSH custom options not accepting -o prefix format from CLI copy-paste
Fixed misleading custom options placeholder in connection dialog

description.p: Flatpak KDE fix, monitoring bar overflow fix, and dependency updates:

ul.li: Fixed SSH connection fails in Flatpak on KDE — host SSH_ASKPASS stripped from child environment
Fixed header bar buttons clipped when sidebar + monitoring enabled — ellipsize and overflow hidden
Dependencies: tokio 1.50, uuid 1.22, regex 1.12, proptest 1.10, tempfile 3.26, zip 8.2

description.p: RDP reliability improvements and Quick Actions menu:

ul.li: Fixed RDP handshake timeout on heavily loaded servers with Phase 3 timeout wrapper
Fixed ARM64 binary download mismatch — no longer falls back to x86_64 binaries
Added RDP Quick Actions dropdown: Task Manager, Settings, PowerShell, CMD, Event Viewer, Services

description.p: Security hardening and code quality improvements:

ul.li: Removed sshpass dependency: native VTE password injection and SSH_ASKPASS mechanism
Bitwarden master password zeroized on drop to scrub heap memory
SSH monitoring askpass script cleaned up automatically via RAII
SPICE embedded client enabled by default with remote-viewer as fallback
Extracted vault operations and window actions into separate modules for maintainability
Removed sshpass from all packaging manifests

description.p: Security hardening and monitoring improvements:

ul.li: Bitwarden session key and monitoring password use SecretString
Config files written with restrictive permissions (0600/0700)
SSH monitoring uses StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new
Session log sanitization active by default
Flatpak device permissions scoped to serial only
RDP TLS certificate policy documented
Monitoring: remote host private IP with full address tooltip
Monitoring: live uptime counter and stopped indication
Monitoring: all mount points in disk tooltip

description.p: Flatpak Remmina import fix, dialog sizing, and dependency updates.

ul.li: Fixed Remmina import in Flatpak — now checks host path ~/.local/share/remmina/
Fixed connection dialog Basic tab clipped by nested ScrolledWindow
Fixed missing minimum sizes on Import, Export, and Shortcuts dialogs
Connection dialog default height increased for better field visibility
Dependencies: serde_yaml_ng 0.10, Teleport 18.7.2, plus patch updates

description.p: Jump host fixes, sshpass detection, and dependency updates.

ul.li: Fixed sshpass not installed error in Flatpak SSH connections
Fixed jump host connections failing port check — skipped when jump host is configured
Fixed jump host dropdown — shows host address in labels with search filtering
Fixed jump host monitoring — SSH commands include jump host chain for bastion hosts
Fixed jump host false positive connection status — checks for SSH failure patterns
Dependencies: Bitwarden CLI 2026.2.0, uuid 1.22.0, winnow 0.7.15

description.p: Security fix, SSH status detection, protocol dialog improvements, and code decomposition.

ul.li: RDP password no longer exposed on command line — FreeRDP fallback uses /from-stdin
SSH connection status now correctly turns green; monitoring starts reliably
Protocol dialog improvements for SSH, RDP, VNC, SPICE, Serial, Kubernetes, Telnet, Zero Trust
SFTP mc sessions now support split view
Connection dialog and embedded RDP decomposed into focused submodules

description.p: Bug fixes: connection group selection, secret variable persistence, reconnect crash, and Bitwarden performance.

ul.li: Connection dialog used a separate data store for the save handler, so the selected group was always lost — connections now land in the correct subgroup
Secret variable values lost after settings reopen — vault-stored values now restored when reopening Variables dialog or substituting variables in connections
Crash on session reconnect — RefCell double-borrow in close_tab fixed by separating the borrow from the close_page call
Bitwarden credential lookup speed — removed per-retrieve vault sync and added verification cache, making reconnect near-instant

description.p: Bitwarden integration fixes, universal secret backend support, and Flatpak SSH improvements:

ul.li: Bitwarden session key and auto-unlock path fixes in Flatpak
Connection dialog credential download uses correct vault lookup key
Vault credential resolve works for all non-KeePass backends
Group password load dispatches to configured default secret backend
Password inheritance works with Bitwarden/1Password/Passbolt/Pass
SSH known_hosts persists in Flatpak sandbox via writable path
Duplicate reconnect banner and SSH dialog auth field visibility fixes

description.p: Secret backend hardening, SSH/Telnet pre-connect port check, and code quality improvements.

ul.li: SSH/Telnet pre-connect port check — fail fast with retry toast
Vault credential lifecycle — orphaned cleanup, paste duplication, group migration
Consistent credential keys across all secret backends
SecretString migration for RDP/SPICE events, GUI structs, CLI input
Mutex lock safety and error logging improvements
CSS extraction, i18n consistency, CI --all-features coverage

description.p: Session reconnect, cluster broadcast, libvirt import, and automation improvements.

ul.li: Reconnect banner on disconnected terminal tabs — one-click reconnection
Cluster broadcast mode sends keyboard input to all terminals simultaneously
Libvirt and GNOME Boxes import — VNC, SPICE, RDP from domain XML
Template manager with search, import, and export
Settings backup and restore as ZIP archive
Automation engine with one-shot rules, templates, and pre/post-connect tasks

description.p: Waypipe support, RDP clipboard integration, icon fixes, and libsecret reliability.

ul.li: Waypipe: Wayland application forwarding for SSH connections
IronRDP bidirectional clipboard sync via cliprdr channel
Fixed missing icons on KDE and non-GNOME desktops
Fixed libsecret password storage and retrieval
Fixed Serial/Kubernetes connection creation
Fixed SFTP via mc opening root instead of home directory
Fixed SSH agent not inherited by VTE terminal processes

description.p: Remote monitoring, custom icons, Bitwarden Flatpak fix, and dependency updates.

ul.li: Custom icons for connections and groups (emoji or GTK icon names)
Remote monitoring bar for SSH/Telnet/K8s terminals (CPU, memory, disk, network)
IronRDP auto-fallback to FreeRDP on protocol negotiation failure
Bitwarden CLI path resolved dynamically for Flatpak sandbox compatibility
Monitoring SSH password auth and error spam fixes

description.p: Command Palette, Favorites, Pass backend, custom keybindings, and tab enhancements.

ul.li: Command Palette: VS Code-style quick launcher with fuzzy search (Ctrl+P)
Favorites: pin connections to a dedicated sidebar section
Pass (passwordstore.org) secret backend via GPG-encrypted password-store
Tab coloring by protocol and named tab groups with color indicators
Custom Keybindings: 30+ configurable shortcuts via Settings
Expanded i18n coverage for connection dialog tabs and content

description.p: Security hardening, Rust 2024 edition, and translation quality improvements.

ul.li: Startup action: auto-open local shell or saved connection on launch (Settings or CLI)
All credential fields migrated to SecretString with point-of-use exposure
FreeRDP password passed via stdin instead of CLI argument
Migrated to Rust 2024 edition across all three crates
Ukrainian translation professionally reviewed (674 strings)
RDP cursor scaling fixed for HiDPI displays
VNC RSA-AES: auto-fallback to external viewer for unsupported encryption

description.p: SSH port forwarding, security hardening, and faster startup.

ul.li: SSH port forwarding with local, remote, and dynamic SOCKS rules
Deferred secret backend initialization for faster startup
Input validation hardening across all protocols
Fixed Quick Connect RDP CredSSP error and Bitwarden compatibility

description.p: AES-256-GCM credential encryption and RDP security improvements.

ul.li: AES-256-GCM replaces XOR obfuscation for stored credentials
FreeRDP password via stdin, Wayland-first client detection
Zero Trust provider validation and CLI tool detection
Snippet support in native export/import format

description.p: Internationalization with 14 languages and CLI overhaul.

ul.li: 14 languages: uk, de, fr, es, it, pl, cs, sk, da, sv, nl, pt, be, kk
SPICE proxy support for Proxmox VE tunnelled connections
RDP HiDPI fix for device-pixel resolution
CLI modularized with shell completions, man page, and fuzzy suggestions

description.p: Secrets management improvements and keyboard layout fix.

ul.li: Fixed embedded RDP keyboard layout for non-US layouts
Vault operations now respect preferred backend setting
Bitwarden auto-unlock at startup with encrypted password restore

description.p: Kubernetes, Serial Console, SFTP browser, and terminal search.

ul.li: Kubernetes protocol via kubectl exec with pod shell access
Serial Console protocol via picocom
SFTP file browser for SSH connections
Terminal search with regex and highlight support
Responsive dialog sizing with adw::Clamp

description.p: FIDO2 authentication and major code refactoring.

ul.li: FIDO2/SecurityKey SSH authentication with hardware key support
Refactored Window, Embedded RDP, and ConnectionDialog modules
Extended Protocol trait with capabilities and build_command methods

description.p: Wake-on-LAN support and Settings dialog performance improvements.

ul.li: Wake-on-LAN from GUI with auto-WoL before connect
Settings dialog loads instantly with background CLI detection
Multiple Flatpak sandbox and thread safety fixes

description.p: Unified keyring integration across all secret backends.
Passbolt integration and unified vault password source.
Telnet keyboard configuration and Flatpak fixes.
Full Telnet protocol support across all crates.
Remmina password import and streaming I/O for imports.
Fixed keyboard shortcuts intercepting terminal input.
Flatpak Components dialog and Snap strict confinement.
Snap strict confinement preparation and permission checking.
Zero Trust UI improvements and connection dialog modularization.
Client detection improvements for Azure CLI, Teleport, and FreeRDP 3.
Flatpak config persistence and host command support for external clients.
Undo/Trash, group credential inheritance, and sidebar refactoring.
Asbru import fixes, group descriptions, and variable substitution.
Password caching TTL, connection retry logic, and 1Password support.
1Password CLI integration with biometric auth and service accounts.
Group-level secret storage and CLI secret management.
KeePass password saving, SSH X11 forwarding, and IronRDP enhancements.
Split view redesign with tree-based panel structure and adw::TabView migration.
Snap package and RDP/VNC performance mode presets.
Bitwarden CLI integration with vault status checking.
MobaXterm import/export and persistent search history.
Credential inheritance from parent groups and SSH Jump Host support.
Codebase audit, unsafe code removal, and error handling improvements.
Settings and Template dialog migration to modern libadwaita patterns.
UI unification, connection history, and Quick Connect for RDP/VNC.
Major code refactoring and wayland-native feature flag.
CLI Wake-on-LAN, snippet management, group management, and search debouncing.
RDP clipboard file transfer, SPICE embedding, expect automation, and status indicators.
Fixed Asbru-CM import and application icon resolution.
IronRDP audio backend and bidirectional clipboard improvements.
Build configuration and Flatpak packaging improvements.
Clippy pedantic compliance and RDP session deactivation-reactivation.
IronRDP clipboard, shared folders (RDPDR), and RemoteFX codec.
Tree view persistence, Zero Trust providers, and RDP window sizing fix.
Initial release
